approvalSource: Steve direct May 20 rolling Foundation Builder queue: build BRAIN-FLEET-QUOTA-LEDGER-001 immediately after Harlan auth escalation and before model capability registry, live provider probes, or extractor proof.
constraints: Every Brain Fleet call must write ledger truth before live route probes
Ledger truth must include workload, route, model, account label, status, artifact, quota/reset state if known, failure reason, and stop condition
Quota/reset unknown must be explicit, not omitted
Stop on auth-needed, rate-limit, quota, and provider failures instead of thrashing
Do not run live provider probes from this card
Do not mutate credentials, provider config, source systems, llm_credentials, or llm_routes
